surveymerge 0.2.0
  • Reference
    • Getting Started with surveymerge
    • Releases
    • Version 0.2.0
    • Changelog

Package index

Main entry point

A one-call wrapper that reads an export, detects its parent-child structure, and assembles datasets at the unit of analysis implied by each repeat group.

survey_merge()
Read and assemble analysis-ready datasets from a survey export

Step-by-step workflow

Use these when you need finer control over how repeat groups are joined and which columns are carried across.

read_survey_export()
Read a relational survey export (XLSForm .xlsx)
detect_structure()
Detect the parent-child sheet structure of a survey export
print(<survey_structure>)
Print a survey_structure object
build_master()
Build analysis-ready datasets from repeat-group sheets
enrich_repeat()
Enrich a repeat sheet with selected columns from its parent

Deprecated

Older names retained from the previous odkmerge release. They still work but emit a deprecation warning on first use.

odk_merge()
Merge a survey export (deprecated; use survey_merge())
read_odk_export()
Read a survey export (deprecated; use read_survey_export())
print(<odk_structure>)
Print an odk_structure object (deprecated)

Package overview

surveymerge surveymerge-package
surveymerge: work with relational survey exports and repeat groups

On this page
